changes.value:
swissarmyhammer-kanban/src/commands/mod.rs:147-158

Both `app.command` and `app.palette` are registered to the same `CommandPaletteCmd` implementation. The alias relationship isn't documented ŌĆö a future maintainer could think one is dead code.

Suggestion: Add a brief comment explaining the alias, e.g. `// app.palette is an alias for app.command ŌĆö both open the command palette`."
app.command and app.palette are undocumented aliases
